'''yovadaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:klinotactic|klinotactic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-v-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:klinotactic|klinotactic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| yovadaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yovadithi|yovadithi]] || [[word:yovadiji|yovadiji]] || [[word:yovadishi|yovadishi]] || [[word:yovadiki|yovadiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yovaduthuthu|yovaduthuthu]] || [[word:yovadujuju|yovadujuju]] || [[word:yovadushushu|yovadushushu]] || [[word:yovadukuku|yovadukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yovaduthu|yovaduthu]] || [[word:yovaduju|yovaduju]] || [[word:yovadushu|yovadushu]] || [[word:yovaduku|yovaduku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yovadufthuf|yovadufthuf]] || [[word:yovadufjuf|yovadufjuf]] || [[word:yovadufshuf|yovadufshuf]] || [[word:yovadufkuf|yovadufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yovadethe|yovadethe]] || [[word:yovadeje|yovadeje]] || [[word:yovadeshe|yovadeshe]] || [[word:yovadeke|yovadeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yovadothotho|yovadothotho]] || [[word:yovadojojo|yovadojojo]] || [[word:yovadoshosho|yovadoshosho]] || [[word:yovadokoko|yovadokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yovadotho|yovadotho]] || [[word:yovadojo|yovadojo]] || [[word:yovadosho|yovadosho]] || [[word:yovadoko|yovadoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yovadofthof|yovadofthof]] || [[word:yovadofjof|yovadofjof]] || [[word:yovadofshof|yovadofshof]] || [[word:yovadofkof|yovadofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:yovadĂŻfthĂŻf|yovadĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:yovadĂŻfjĂŻf|yovadĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:yovadĂŻfshĂŻf|yovadĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:yovadĂŻfkĂŻf|yovadĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:yovadĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|yovadĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:yovadĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|yovadĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:yovadĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|yovadĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:yovadĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|yovadĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:yovadĂŻfthĂŻf|yovadĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:yovadĂŻfjĂŻf|yovadĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:yovadĂŻfshĂŻf|yovadĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:yovadĂŻfkĂŻf|yovadĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:yovadĂŻfthĂŻf|yovadĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:yovadĂŻfjĂŻf|yovadĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:yovadĂŻfshĂŻf|yovadĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:yovadĂŻfkĂŻf|yovadĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yovadĂŠthĂŠ|yovadĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:yovadĂŠjĂŠ|yovadĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:yovadĂŠshĂŠ|yovadĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:yovadĂŠkĂŠ|yovadĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yovadathatha|yovadathatha]] || [[word:yovadajaja|yovadajaja]] || [[word:yovadashasha|yovadashasha]] || [[word:yovadakaka|yovadakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yovadatha|yovadatha]] || [[word:yovadaja|yovadaja]] || [[word:yovadasha|yovadasha]] || [[word:yovadaka|yovadaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yovadafthaf|yovadafthaf]] || [[word:yovadafjaf|yovadafjaf]] || [[word:yovadafshaf|yovadafshaf]] || [[word:yovadafkaf|yovadafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:yovadasha|yovadasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:yovadshĂ«sha|yovadshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yovadrosha|yovadrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yovadmusha|yovadmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:yovadyasha|yovadyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyovadnkshĂ«sha|goyovadnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyovadnkrosha|goyovadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyovadnkmusha|goyovadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyovadnkyasha|goyovadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:yovavadasha|yovavadasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yovavadshĂ«sha|yovavadshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yovavadrosha|yovavadrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yovavadmusha|yovavadmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yovavadyasha|yovavadyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyovavadnkshĂ«sha|goyovavadnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyovavadnkrosha|goyovavadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyovavadnkmusha|goyovavadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyovavadnkyasha|goyovavadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:yevĂŠdasha|yevĂŠdasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yevĂŠdshĂ«sha|yevĂŠdshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yevĂŠdrosha|yevĂŠdrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yevĂŠdmusha|yevĂŠdmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yevĂŠdyasha|yevĂŠdyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyevĂŠdnkshĂ«sha|goyevĂŠdnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyevĂŠdnkrosha|goyevĂŠdnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyevĂŠdnkmusha|goyevĂŠdnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyevĂŠdnkyasha|goyevĂŠdnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:yovfadasha|yovfadasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yovfadshĂ«sha|yovfadshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yovfadrosha|yovfadrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yovfadmusha|yovfadmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yovfadyasha|yovfadyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyovfadnkshĂ«sha|goyovfadnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyovfadnkrosha|goyovfadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyovfadnkmusha|goyovfadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyovfadnkyasha|goyovfadnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
